# SocialFirst Labs

> Remote digital growth agency serving US and European brands. Based in Kathmandu, Nepal with clients across the United States, United Kingdom, Germany, Netherlands, Singapore, India, and globally.

## About
SocialFirst Labs is a professional digital marketing agency founded in 2022, specialising in paid media, SEO, Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO), Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO), AI automation, performance creative, and web development. The agency is based in Kathmandu, Nepal and operates fully remotely, serving brands across North America, Europe, South Asia, and Southeast Asia. Available during US EST and EU CET business hours.

Email: hi@socialfirstlabs.com
Website: https://www.socialfirstlabs.com
Booking: https://cal.com/socialfirstlabs/15min

## Why international brands choose SocialFirst Labs
- Senior-level strategy at 40–60% lower cost than equivalent US or UK agencies
- Asynchronous-first workflow optimised for US EST and EU CET timezones
- Paid media, SEO/AEO/GEO, AI automation, and performance creative under one roof
- GDPR-compliant systems for EU clients
- Minimum 3-month engagements with full ownership of all assets

## Services

### Paid Media
Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok, and YouTube campaign management. Full-funnel audience strategy. Weekly optimisation cadence. Ad spend separate from management fee.

### SEO / AEO / GEO
Technical and on-page SEO. Answer Engine Optimisation for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity. Generative Engine Optimisation for LLM citations. Content authority systems.

### Websites and Landing Pages
High-conversion landing pages engineered for speed, trust, and revenue. Custom design and development. CRO-optimised copy. A/B testing infrastructure. Core Web Vitals performance.

### AI Automation and CRM Integration
Custom AI workflows for lead nurturing, automated follow-up, CRM build and integration, and reporting dashboards. Saves clients 40+ hours per month in manual tasks.

### Performance Creative
Static and video ads engineered to stop the scroll. UGC-style video production. Static ad design at volume. Creative testing frameworks. Hook and angle iteration.

### Video Editing
Short-form and long-form video editing. Reels, TikTok, Shorts, YouTube long-form, brand storytelling, and ad-ready video assets.

## Verified Case Studies

### DTC Skincare Brand (E-commerce)
Result: $0 to $85,000 monthly revenue in 4 months. ROAS of 4.2x achieved. Services used: Meta Ads, landing page, email automation, performance creative.

### B2B SaaS HR Tech Company (Series A)
Result: 3.1x pipeline growth, 42% reduction in cost per lead, achieved in 90 days. Services used: Google Ads, CRO, AI automation.

### Restaurant Group — Nepal (Local F&B)
Result: #1 Google ranking across 3 cities, +270% organic traffic in 3 months. Services used: Local SEO, GEO, content.

### Business Coach (Personal Brand)
Result: 40,000 audience built, $22,000 monthly revenue from scratch in 6 months. Services used: video editing, content strategy, funnel architecture.

## Pricing
Ad spend is always separate from the management fee. Clients pay platforms (Meta, Google) directly from their own accounts.
- Launch plan: recommended ad spend $500–$1,000/month
- Growth plan: recommended ad spend $2,000–$5,000/month
- All plans: minimum 3-month commitment. 30 days notice to cancel after minimum period.
- Currencies accepted: USD, EUR, GBP, NPR

## Markets Served
United States, United Kingdom, Germany, France, Netherlands, Singapore, India, Nepal, and globally across South Asia, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East.
